measurement_note: Size is m, the maximum customer ID. Each tier contains every even ID through m, so c=m/2 and all odd IDs are missing. The Accepted recursive anti-join and an independent materialized NOT IN query take O((m+c) log(c+1)) portable time. A correct correlated count query rescans all c customer rows for each of m generated candidates, completes all 32/128/512 tiers, and is rejected only by scaling.
